author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit 94a7f22: workspace version 0.2.9 -> 0.3.0 (5 strings in root Cargo.toml incl. the four internal dep versions — bumped with ripsed itself), CHANGELOG Unreleased retitled [0.3.0] - 2026-06-09, Cargo.lock refreshed (7 workspace members at 0.3.0 incl. fuzz). Verified: 25 test suites green, clippy -D warnings clean, fmt clean. Also removed stray gitignored *.ripsed.lock sentinels from dogfooding runs. Remaining HUMAN steps to ship: git push, tag v0.3.0 (triggers the release workflow incl. deb + completions), cargo publish in order core->fs->json->ripsed->cli.
